title: AI Fluency for Nonprofits
subtitle: This course empowers nonprofit professionals to develop AI fluency in order to increase organizational impact and efficiency while staying true to their mission and values.

sections.name: Introduction
sections.description: Define AI Fluency and learn the four interconnected competencies—Delegation, Description, Discernment, and Diligence—that form the foundation of this course.

sections.name: Description-Discernment
sections.description: Practice crafting context-rich prompts and critically evaluating AI outputs through research and writing examples.

sections.name: Delegation-Diligence
sections.description: Make thoughtful decisions about what tasks to delegate to AI while taking responsibility for high-stakes considerations like data privacy and analytical accuracy.

sections.name: Putting it all together
sections.description: Apply all four dimensions of the 4D Framework to automate workflows and integrate AI thoughtfully into your organization.
